what: Download and apply the update using Tauri updater
why: Keep app current with latest features and security fixes
output: Update application result including restart scheduling status

error_handling.criteria: Update package download fails due to network or server issues

event.message: Failed to download update package — continuing with current version

error_handling.criteria: Update package downloaded but installation process fails
error_handling.action: Rollback to previous version, notify user

event.message: Update installation failed — rolling back to previous version

decisions.outcome: Skip update, continue with current version
Rollback to previous version, continue boot
